candidates.snippet: Ny. Sans Buy Ny. is a family of custom typefaces originally designed for the redesign of The New York Times Magazine in 2015. The inspiration for the serif font is Stephenson Blake’s Garamond-like metal typeface Mazarin,

Sorbian, Vunjo, Walloon, Welsh, Western Frisian, Wolof, Xhosa, Zulu Manufacturer: A2-TYPE Designer: Henrik Kubel Year: 2022 Copyright: © A2-TYPE Trademark: Ny. Sans is a trademark of A2-TYPE Licence: Terms and condition
